required: Video assets are sharper without changing public URLs

items.title: Re-encode website MP4s
items.description: Replace the four low-resolution public/videos MP4s with browser-compatible H.264 MP4s generated from the matching high-resolution MOV originals. Preserve public URLs and aspect ratios, target about 720px source width, and strip audio because the site uses muted looping playback.
acceptanceCriteria: All four public/videos/*.mp4 files are regenerated from the matching MOV originals
Each replacement MP4 is about 720px wide while preserving source aspect ratio
Each replacement MP4 has no audio track
No React component or route changes are needed for the new assets

items.title: Verify build and homepage playback
items.description: Verify metadata, build the Next.js app, and smoke-test the homepage so the higher-resolution videos render correctly at the existing URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Metadata checks confirm dimensions, durations, and no audio tracks for all four MP4s
Homepage smoke test confirms the existing /videos/*.mp4 URLs are present
git diff is limited to expected task, sprint, adapter, and video asset changes
